The '''Shield of Yavin''' was an award given to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. It was canonized after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

[[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] received the award for his role in helping the Alliance fleet evade Imperial pursuit, acquire much needed food supplies, capture experimental technology, and eventually cause tremendous damage at an Imperial [[Deepdock/Legends|Deepdock]] by using the Corvette [[Ram's Head]] to destroy the bridge towers of several Star Destroyers.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
